title: the Confessor
name: Photius and Anicetas
Maximus
troparia: (Tone 4) Your martyrs, O Lord,* by their passion acquired the crowns of incorruptibility from You, our God.* For possessing Your power, they overcame the torturers* and shattered the feeble insolence of demons.* By their supplications, save our souls!

(Tone 8) Guide of orthodoxy, teacher of piety and purity,* luminary of the world, inspired adornment of hierarchs, O wise Maximus,* you have enlightened all by your teachings, O spiritual trumpet.* Intercede with Christ our God for the salvation of our souls.
kontakia: (Tone 4) You crushed the rage of the vicious torturers* by your brave endurance of their torments.* Now you rejoice in the courts of heaven,* O blessed martyrs Photius and Anicetus.* You are blessed forever and ever,* praying for those who honor you.

(Tone 6) Taking its abode within your heart,* the thrice-brilliant light made you a chosen vessel.* It has revealed heavenly things in you, O blessed saint.* You made deep and complicated ideas clear to us,* and you preached the eternal Trinity to everyone, O Maximus.
